error_message: Workflow execution completely non-functional — node stays IDLE, Claude CLI shows '1 MCP server failed'
root_cause: MCP server registered with Claude CLI using legacy SSE transport (--transport sse). Claude Code's current transport is Streamable HTTP. SSE connection to loopback fails silently.
fix: Switched server.mjs from SSEServerTransport to StreamableHTTPServerTransport. Changed claude mcp add to use --transport http with correct option ordering (all flags before server name).

error_message: agent:ready handshake bypassed — readyEvent resolves immediately without waiting for MCP
root_cause: activation_pending was in the acceptedStatuses set for readyEvent. DB already has activation_pending when the poll first runs (250ms), causing immediate false-positive resolution.
fix: Removed activation_pending from the readyEvent acceptedStatuses set. Now only resolves on registered/ready/activation_acked/running/completed/done.

error_message: Status regression: node written back to activation_pending after NEW_TASK inject
root_cause: acknowledge_runtime_activation called with status: 'activation_pending' immediately after NEW_TASK signal was injected, at a point when the node was already in 'ready' state.
fix: Removed the spurious acknowledge_runtime_activation(activation_pending) call after NEW_TASK inject. Status stays 'ready' until Claude ACKs via get_task_details.

error_message: Launch step corrupts already-running Claude session by sending ctrl-u + 'claude' as a chat message
root_cause: processActivation always sends \x15{cliType}\r to PTY without checking if the CLI is already running. In an active Claude TUI, ctrl-u clears input and 'claude\r' sends 'claude' as a user message.
fix: Added get_pty_recent_output check before PTY launch. If cliType name is found in recent output, skip launch entirely. If not found, launch with shorter 500ms pre-delay and 2s post-delay.

error_message: Launcher pane Confirm button silently fails — invoke('mcp_store_mission') not registered
root_cause: LauncherPane called invoke('mcp_store_mission') which is not registered as a Tauri command in lib.rs. Tauri rejects it, error caught by try/catch, addPane never reached.
fix: Replaced mcp_store_mission with start_mission_graph (which is registered and persists the mission + starts execution).

error_message: Auth token regenerated on every app restart — running Claude instances use stale token and get 401
root_cause: generate_push_token() called fresh on every init_mcp_server(). New token registered with claude mcp add, but any already-running Claude instance has old URL in memory.
fix: Added load_or_generate_auth_token() that persists the auth token to app_local_data_dir/mcp_auth.token. Token is reused across restarts; only regenerated if file is missing.
